key_findings: RM stick reader with TensorAccessor, compute tilize_block, single-buffered CBs c_0/c_16 sized to ntiles_per_block
Compute untilize via pack_untilize helper, RM stick writer with TensorAccessor sub-page writes, double-buffered for multi-block
Per-channel norm: sub_tiles, mul_tiles, add_tiles, rsqrt; binary_dest_reuse for chaining; eps fill pattern; freq/counter for channel stats lifetime

question: How does reduce work in tt-metal for row-wise reductions?
findings: reduce_tile_math with REDUCE_ROW, scaler tile with 1/N for AVG, generate_reduce_scaler fills row 0 of each face

modifications: Adapt stick reader pattern; also generate reduce scaler and epsilon scalar tiles
Tilize -> reduce(SUM,ROW) -> sub(COL) -> square -> reduce(SUM,ROW) -> add(SCALAR,eps) -> rsqrt -> mul(COL) -> untilize
Adapt RM stick writer pattern from untilize
